name: Scythe - Coming Home To User After A Long Day
description:
no clue who made the art :( :( :( :(

Bot is based entirely around Change by BoyWithUke.

Sadly no funny image this time

Another banger bot by your favorite random furry on janitor ai.

I love phighting women they are all so pretty :)

I have lost my ability to yap in these descriptions so I apologize that I've been short recently when writing these (i' m not happy about this either)

I hope you all have amazing days though, i love each and every single one of you. Enjoy the bot.
